## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content production, publishing, and website updates for HeyGen.](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [29 articles are scheduled and ready to publish, mainly related to tools](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Publishing issues in Webflow are causing delays; team to troubleshoot and resolve](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Tools directory is ready to go live, pending final review](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Team to maintain weekly cadence of 3 e-learning and 2 marketing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [29 articles scheduled and ready in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Fatima has been working on marketing articles as suggested](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Team aims for 10 articles weekly: 3 e-learning, 2 marketing, 5 supporting other pages](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Publishing delays due to Webflow access issues; team troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Tools Directory Launch

  - [Content and design ready for Tools Directory](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Nav to review and potentially go live today](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Plans to overhaul directory within two weeks to new structure (ecosystem partners, agency partners)](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Need to add meta titles and descriptions for all articles](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Prioritize high-traffic pages like eLearning and Enterprise for Technical SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Jimmy to help set up Airtable integration for easier bulk updates of blog metadata](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Airtable Workflow Optimization

  - [Add column for initiatives (e-learning, marketing) to track strategic focus](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Implement week number column for easier tracking of weekly publications](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Holly requested ability to filter by e-learning and marketing categories](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

### Blog Post Publishing Process

  - [Team resolved immediate publishing blockage during the call](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Discussed backdating of historical blog posts and potential SEO implications](https://fathom.video/share/KKfvTkxBrJaXPEKh7GizWswUcwcscdzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Nav to review Tools Directory for potential launch today
2.  Jimmy to send Airtable integration setup details to Nav
3.  Add new columns to Airtable (initiative type, week number, staging link)
4.  Resolve ongoing Webflow publishing issues
5.  Maintain weekly cadence of 3 e-learning and 2 marketing blog posts
6.  Implement meta titles and descriptions, prioritizing high-traffic pages
7.  Holly to review and publish remaining draft blog posts after the call
